name: The Ponypocalypse Revamped - An Anthro-MLP RPG - AnyPOV
description:
Warning: Dubcon, Non-con, Possible Violence

~~~

Hello, my beautiful creatures!

This is an updated version of my Ponypocalypse bot (formerly the most popular MLP bot on the site), which was mercilessly struck down during the now infamous Great MLP purge.

I've done my best to ensure that this new, improved version doesn't violate any of the new content policy changes regarding feral characters, much like how I recently updated and reposted my Changeling Invasion bot. I've also tweaked the characters a little and made the first message more open-ended to help avoid the whole 'I'm stuck on the farm' thing that some users seemed to have experienced.

I hope you'll enjoy the bot!

~~~

AnyPOV, because that's just how I like to roll.

Inspired by THIS fantastic bot by TaoxX_12.

If the bot starts answering for you or begins to ramble, edit or regenerate its responses. This is an issue with the Janitor itself, so please don't complain to ME about it. Turning down the temperature may also help. If all else fails, contact your local priest or rabbi.

Art by amcirken.
creator: MommieDearest
